raw.message: Michigan’s trusted sportsbook, now dealing you in for poker!

hook.summary: High-energy montage of live-hosted casino games and spinning wheels.
hook.visual_action: A host in a red circus-style uniform spins a large colorful prize wheel while multipliers flash on the screen.
hook.text_overlay: Crazy Time, Red Door Roulette, Gambling Problem? Call 1-800-GAMBLER
hook.voiceover_transcript: All right, spin the wheel please.

scene_flow: Rapid-fire montage of live-hosted casino games including Crazy Time and Red Door Roulette.
Close-up shots of game mechanics like the Flip-o-matic and multipliers landing on high values.
Host celebrating a big win of $1,300 on screen with festive graphics.
Transition to the BetRivers mobile app interface showing slot gameplay on a smartphone.
Final promotional screen detailing the $500 bonus back offer and bonus spins.
on_screen_text: WIN YOUR FIRST DAY OR GET UP TO $500 BONUS BACK
cta_text: WIN YOUR FIRST DAY OR GET UP TO $500 BONUS BACK
audience_proxy: Adults 21+ who enjoy high-energy live casino games and online gambling.
